dkim_private_key.description:
DKIM Private Key for the domain. Only RSA keys with a minimum key size of 2048 bits are supported.

**Note:** This parameter is only supported on [Platform Partner](https://ahasend.com/partners) accounts.

tracking_subdomain.description: Optional custom tracking subdomain. Omit to use the default on create.

return_path_subdomain.description: Optional custom return-path subdomain. Omit to use the default on create.

subscription_subdomain.description: Optional custom subscription management subdomain. Omit to use the default on create.

media_subdomain.description: Optional custom media subdomain. Omit to use the default on create.

dkim_rotation_interval_days.description: Optional custom DKIM rotation interval in days. Only supported for managed DNS domains on eligible plans.
